# Code In WordPress — AI Crawler Guidance
# https://codeinwordpress.com

> Professional WordPress development, speed optimization, and SEO services for businesses across New Mexico.

## About
Code In WordPress is a WordPress-focused agency serving Albuquerque, Santa Fe, Las Cruces, Rio Rancho, Roswell, Farmington, and Los Alamos. With 400+ completed projects and a 99% client satisfaction rate, we deliver fast, secure, SEO-optimized WordPress websites.

## Services
- WordPress Development (custom themes, Elementor, ACF): https://codeinwordpress.com/services/wordpress-development
- Speed Optimization (Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse 90+): https://codeinwordpress.com/services/speed-optimization
- WordPress SEO (technical audit, schema, rankings): https://codeinwordpress.com/services/wordpress-seo
- Website Maintenance (updates, backups, monitoring): https://codeinwordpress.com/services/website-maintenance
- Security Hardening (firewall, malware, SSL): https://codeinwordpress.com/services/security-hardening
- WooCommerce Development (store setup, payments): https://codeinwordpress.com/services/woocommerce-development
- Website Redesign (modern design, UX, migration): https://codeinwordpress.com/services/website-redesign

## Pricing
- Starter: $500 (up to 10 pages)
- Professional: $900 (up to 20 pages)
- Enterprise: $1,500 (20+ pages or e-commerce)
- All plans include 14-day money-back guarantee and 6 months free support
